case_title: TOWNSEND STREET ASSOCIATES, LLC VS BATES, ANGIE N.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BATES, ANGIE N. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT TOWNSEND STREET ASSOCIATES, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
